assets.label: player-wolf-spider-anchor
assets.notes: Slice-1 hero + style anchor. 64px top-down pixel wolf spider, faces EAST (rotation=velocity.angle()).

assets.label: enemy-trapdoor-spider
assets.notes: Trapdoor spider enemy, styled off the wolf anchor. Faces east.

assets.label: web-trap-spent
assets.notes: Torn spent web left after consumption.

assets.label: tunnel-floor-wall-15piece
assets.notes: generate_tileset, pixel/topdown/15-piece/32px/two_surfaces. Prompt: 'packed dirt tunnel floor and rough dirt-brown stone wall, floor #2B2621 wall #4F453B'. Dark blue-black floor with orange-lit cracks (volcanic/lava-cave read, not the requested dirt-brown) -- user picked it for the atmosphere anyway over 3 closer-to-palette alternatives. 4x4 atlas, 32px cells, SpriteCook dual-grid mask order.

assets.label: wall-material-v3
assets.notes: generate_game_art mode=texture, bg_mode=include, dirt-brown palette (#4F453B/#2B2621). Third attempt: first two ('pebble'/'stone' wording) produced strong vertical rock-column banding that survived a prompt tweak toward 'irregular, non-repeating'; only dropping pebble/stone language entirely ('smooth compacted dirt wall, no embedded rocks or stones') fixed it. Verified seamless via a headless Godot 4x4 tile composite, no visible repeat or banding. Intentionally plain/subtle -- pair with assets/decals/ for visual variety, not meant to carry detail alone.

assets.label: floor-material-v2
assets.notes: generate_game_art mode=texture, bg_mode=include, dirt-brown palette. First attempt had a real defect (checkerboard/transparency-checker artifact baked into several patches despite bg_mode=include) plus an obvious diamond-grid repeat; this regeneration ('fully opaque solid dirt surface' + 'irregular, avoid symmetric/grid patterns') fixed the checkerboard artifact. Some faint per-tile motif repetition remains at close inspection (verified via headless Godot 3x3 tile composite) but reads fine at normal viewing distance.

assets.label: decal-root-tangle
assets.notes: generate_game_art mode=assets, bg_mode=transparent. Isolated root-tangle detail for stamping onto wall_material variety (WallOverdrawMask use case). Clean cutout, no issues found.

assets.label: decal-crack-mineral-stain
assets.notes: generate_game_art mode=assets, bg_mode=transparent. Isolated crack/mineral-stain detail for stamping onto wall_material variety (WallOverdrawMask use case). Clean cutout, no issues found.
